classifications.rationale: Already-loaded input references are supported by the current resolver surface.
Bounded value resolution is already supported by the current resolver surface.
Predicate evaluation is already supported and can carry the bootstrap equality checks.
Projection mechanics are already supported by the current resolver surface.
Evidence emission is already a generic resolver capability and can cover the declared output/evidence boundary.
Lineage comparison is Defracto-specific meaning and belongs in the SEJ projection or contract layer, not in the resolver primitive catalog.
Finding semantics belong to Defracto contract/projection material, while the resolver should only project declared result data.
Result shape should be authored by the SEJ contract and projected by the resolver, not invented as resolver-specific business meaning.
